subject: Trapinch, a small orange head-heavy ant larva-like creature in a sandy desert
description: A small, round-headed creature with an oversized jaw and tiny body sits in a sandy desert landscape. The figure is predominantly orange with a large blunt head and tiny legs, giving it a top-heavy, somewhat comical appearance. Behind it, a sandy desert scene stretches out with small cacti or desert plants, and a pale blue sky overhead. The creature's enormous head and small body emphasize its pit-trap nature. The palette is warm oranges, sandy yellows, and pale blue.
foreground: small round-headed orange creature with oversized jaw and tiny body
background: sandy desert with cacti and pale blue sky
